Class Post

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.Post
public class Post extends Object

Title: Post Class

Description: Represents a discussion post made by a student. Each post has a unique auto-generated ID, an author, a title, a body, an optional thread name (defaults to "General"), a creation timestamp, and a soft delete flag.

Character limits: title max 200 chars, body max 10,000 chars.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    DEFAULT_THREAD
    Default thread name used when none is supplied.
    static final int
    MAX_BODY_LENGTH
    Maximum number of characters allowed in a post body (~2,000 words).
    static final int
    MAX_TITLE_LENGTH
    Maximum number of characters allowed in a post title.

  • Field Details

    • MAX_TITLE_LENGTH

      public static final int MAX_TITLE_LENGTH
      Maximum number of characters allowed in a post title.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MAX_BODY_LENGTH

      public static final int MAX_BODY_LENGTH
      Maximum number of characters allowed in a post body (~2,000 words).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEFAULT_THREAD

      public static final String DEFAULT_THREAD
      Default thread name used when none is supplied.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • Post

      public Post(String authorUsername, String title, String body, String threadName)

      Method: Post(String authorUsername, String title, String body, String threadName)

      Description: Creates a new Post. The post ID and creation timestamp are assigned automatically. All supplied fields are passed through their validated setters.

      Parameters:
      authorUsername - the username of the post author; must not be null
      title - the post title; 1–200 non-blank characters required
      body - the post body; 1–10,000 non-blank characters required
      threadName - the thread name; null or blank defaults to "General"
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any validation rule is violated

  • Method Details

    • getPostId

      public String getPostId()

      Method: String getPostId()

      Returns:
      the unique post ID (UUID string)

    • getAuthorUsername

      public String getAuthorUsername()

      Method: String getAuthorUsername()

      Returns:
      the username of the post author

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()

      Method: String getTitle()

      Returns:
      the post title

    • getBody

      public String getBody()

      Method: String getBody()

      Returns:
      the post body content

    • getThreadName

      public String getThreadName()

      Method: String getThreadName()

      Returns:
      the thread this post belongs to

    • getCreatedAt

      public LocalDateTime getCreatedAt()

      Method: LocalDateTime getCreatedAt()

      Returns:
      the timestamp when this post was created

    • isDeleted

      public boolean isDeleted()

      Method: boolean isDeleted()

      Returns:
      true if the post has been soft-deleted, false otherwise

    • setAuthorUsername

      public void setAuthorUsername(String authorUsername)

      Method: void setAuthorUsername(String authorUsername)

      Description: Sets the author username. Must not be null.

      Parameters:
      authorUsername - the author's username
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if authorUsername is null

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)

      Method: void setTitle(String title)

      Description: Sets the post title. Must not be null, must not be blank, and must not exceed MAX_TITLE_LENGTH characters.

      Parameters:
      title - the post title
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if title is null, blank, or too long

    • setBody

      public void setBody(String body)

      Method: void setBody(String body)

      Description: Sets the post body. Must not be null, must not be blank, and must not exceed MAX_BODY_LENGTH characters.

      Parameters:
      body - the post body content
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if body is null, blank, or too long

    • setThreadName

      public void setThreadName(String threadName)

      Method: void setThreadName(String threadName)

      Description: Sets the thread name. If null or blank, defaults to "General".

      Parameters:
      threadName - the thread name; may be null or blank

    • setDeleted

      public void setDeleted(boolean deleted)

      Method: void setDeleted(boolean deleted)

      Description: Sets the soft-delete flag for this post.

      Parameters:
      deleted - true to mark the post as deleted, false to restore it

    • markAsRead

      public void markAsRead(String username)

      Method: void markAsRead(String username)

      Description: Records that the given user has read this post.

      Parameters:
      username - the username to mark as having read this post

    • isReadBy

      public boolean isReadBy(String username)

      Method: boolean isReadBy(String username)

      Description: Returns true if the given user has read this post.

      Parameters:
      username - the username to check
      Returns:
      true if the user has read this post, false otherwise
